title: USDH on Hyperliquid with Sky
summary_title: Sky's decentralized stablecoin vision for Hyperliquid governance and infrastructure
summary_description: Rune breaks down Sky's USDH proposal, governance framework, and how decentralized collateral strategies outperform centralized stablecoins.

key_moments.label: Hosts introduce the Space and Rune's background in crypto
Zerk introduces himself as RecGang co-founder and Hyperliquid validator
Rune recounts his crypto journey from 2011 Bitcoin to co-founding MakerDAO and Sky
Discussion of decentralized vs centralized stablecoins and crypto's original ethos
Rune explains Sky's governance tools and the tokenized star agent framework
Exploration of Hyperliquid-native collateral options like HLP and derivatives
Rune pitches why Sky's USDH would be the best option for Hyperliquid
Closing remarks and call to action for Hyperliquid community members
